title: Thai Beef Stew
description: A flavorful and comforting Thai-inspired beef stew made with tender beef, vegetables, and aromatic spices.
instructions: 1. Heat oil in a large Dutch oven or heavy pot over medium-high heat.
2. Add the sliced beef and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
3. Remove the browned beef from the pot and set aside.
4. Add the chopped onion and minced garlic to the pot and cook until the onion is translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
5. Add the sliced ginger and cook for 1 minute.
6. Add the red curry paste and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
7. Add the coconut milk, fish sauce, soy sauce, and brown sugar to the pot. Stir to combine.
8. Return the browned beef to the pot and bring the mixture to a simmer.
9. Reduce the heat to low and let the stew simmer, covered, for 2-3 hours, or until the beef is tender.
10. Stir in the chopped Thai basil and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
11. Serve the stew hot, garnished with additional Thai basil if desired.
